channel.title: AI Credits on Sujith Quintelier
channel.description: Recent content in AI Credits on Sujith Quintelier

item.title: github: AI credit pools for cost centers in the billing UI
item.description:
GitHub Billing UI now lets you manage a cost center’s AI credit pool directly when creating or editing cost centers. Before this change, that configuration was only available through another interface.

  • Source: GitHub

item.title: github: Cost centers now support AI credit pools
item.description:
Cost centers can now be assigned caps on how much of an enterprise’s monthly included AI credits they can consume. The feature is available through the REST API.

  • Source: GitHub

item.title: github: Set AI credit session limits in Copilot CLI and SDK
item.description:
GitHub Copilot CLI and the GitHub Copilot SDK now support AI credit session limits, letting you cap how much an agent can spend in a single session. This is intended to help control usage during longer-running agent workflows.

  • Source: GitHub

item.title: github: Per-user AI credit budgets available for cost centers
item.description:
Enterprise admins can now assign a per-user AI credit budget to a cost center, with the budget applying to each individual member. The budget updates as cost center membership changes.

  • Source: GitHub

item.title: github: April reports are now available to prepare for usage-based billing
item.description:
GitHub now lets customers download April usage reports to see how Copilot activity maps to AI credits ahead of the new usage-based billing rollout. The billing unit of AI credits is going live on a staged schedule.

  • Source: GitHub
